prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap industrial stocks like Honeywell (HON), I estimated a 3-day prediction using historical volatility measures. Large industrials typically exhibit daily volatility of 1.5-2.5%. For a 3-day horizon, I applied a modest upward bias reflecting general market trends, with confidence intervals widening based on the square root of time scaling principle and normal distribution assumptions at 67%, 128%, and 165% of estimated standard deviation respectively.
